extract: If you were looking for the song, see Eon Ticket (song). The Eon Ticket (Japanese: むげんのチケット Infinite Ticket) is an event-exclusive Key Item in Pokémon Ruby, Sapphire, Emerald, Omega Ruby, and Alpha Sapphire. It cannot be obtained normally in-game; instead, it must be downloaded at a promotional event or using the Eon Ticket e-Card.
